title: Transparent Glowing
description: Makes the glowing effect fade to transparency instead of black
body: This mod makes the glowing effect outline fade to transparency instead of black. Left is Transparent Glowing, Right is Vanilla ![Cross compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Id3l0ZS7/images/0a650e4a022dc14cf4b444bbd42fe2522cf3c351.png) Due to how this mod works, it does not work with black outlines.
